ScamReport.title: Scam Report
ScamReport.description: A report submitted by a user about a potential scam.

AwarenessResource.title: Awareness Resource
AwarenessResource.description: An educational post about cyber security.

/reports/{reportId}.description:
Access Policy: 
1. Public: Allow create with status 'pending'. Allow list/get IF status == 'approved'.
2. Admin (request.auth != null): Allow full CRUD (list/get/create/update/delete) on all documents.

/awareness_resources/{resourceId}.description:
Access Policy: 
1. Public: Allow get/list (Read only).
2. Admin (request.auth != null): Allow full CRUD.
